race.comment: CYBERSECURITY (2) is a well-bred colt who ran a nice race on debut at Bendigo, in the market and boxing on well for third after showing speed. He can be better for that and should be very hard to catch with the added experience. VELLA LONGA (5) is a gelding by Rubick on debut for the Greg Eurell yard who are in great form of late. He's looked good at the jumpouts and draws well, keeping safe. CONTARINI (9) ran a good race on debut at Cranbourne at double-figure odds when racing up on speed. Up in trip should suit and she'll take catching from the inside. KOSEI TOP (4) is a gelding by All Too Hard on debut for the Maher yard who can run well off a jumpout win while GLIDE (3) is a colt by Proisir for the Sutton yard who has jumped out well and can be strong late.
